name: Blog Header
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
css: .header { padding: 1.5rem 0; background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; text-decoration: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 1.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.95rem; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #dc2626; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } }

name: Blog Hero
html:
{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{initials}}
{{authorName}}{{authorDesc}}
css: .hero { padding: 4rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .hero-content { text-align: center; } .hero-title { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.25rem; color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.6; } .author-bio { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; background: #f9fafb; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; } .author-avatar { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; } .author-name { color: #111827; display: block; } .author-desc { color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } .author-bio { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; } }

subtitle.default: A personal blog exploring the intersection of creativity and code, with reflections on building products and living intentionally.

name: Blog Posts List
html:
{{title}}

{{#each posts}}
{{category}}

{{title}}

{{excerpt}}

{{date}}{{readTime}}
{{/each}}
css: .posts { padding: 3rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; } .section-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; } .posts-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; } .post-link { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: background 0.2s; } .post-link:hover { background: #f9fafb; } .post-category { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #dc2626; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .post-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; line-height: 1.3; } .post-excerpt { color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .post-meta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; }

default.title: Why I Switched to Static Site Generation
default.excerpt: After years of dynamic rendering, here's why I made the switch and how it transformed my workflow.

default.title: The Art of White Space in UI Design
default.excerpt: How mastering negative space can dramatically improve your interface designs and user experience.

default.title: Building in Public: 6 Months In
default.excerpt: Lessons learned, mistakes made, and unexpected wins from sharing my development journey publicly.

default.title: Understanding React Server Components
default.excerpt: A practical guide to React Server Components and when to use them in your applications.

name: Blog Newsletter
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each fields}}{{/each}}
css: .newsletter { padding: 3rem 0; background: #f9fafb; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .newsletter-card { background: #fff; padding: 2.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; } .newsletter-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .newsletter-desc { color: #6b7280; } .newsletter-form { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .form-input { padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 1rem; width: 250px; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #dc2626; } .btn-primary { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .newsletter-card { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; } .newsletter-form { width: 100%; } .form-input { width: 100%; } }

description.default: Get new articles delivered to your inbox. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.

name: Blog About Section
html:
{{title}}

{{text}}

{{#each links}}{{label}}{{/each}}
css: .about { padding: 4rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .about-content { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .about-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .about-text { color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .about-links { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .about-link { color: #dc2626; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .about-link:hover { border-color: #dc2626; }

text.default: I'm a developer and writer based in San Francisco. I've been building for the web for over 10 years and writing about it for 5. This blog is where I share what I've learned along the way — the wins, the failures, and everything in between.

name: Blog Contact Form
description: Simple contact form for blog readers
html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}
{{#if type='textarea'}}{{else}}{{/if}}
{{/each}}
css: .contact-form { padding: 4rem 0; background: #f9fafb; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-title { font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; text-align: center; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 1rem; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #dc2626; } textarea.form-input { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .btn-primary { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-weight: 600; }

name: Blog Footer
html:
{{copyright}}

    {{#each links}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
css: .footer { padding: 2rem 0; background: #fff; border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb; } .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .footer-inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .copyright { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; } .footer-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 1.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .footer-links a { color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #dc2626; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-inner { flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; text-align: center; } }
